memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bobolink → 其鸣叫声 bob-o-link 得名，北美候鸟
bobolinks = bobolink + s，多只长脚雀

coreMeaning.cn: 短促上下移动；波波头（复数/第三人称单数）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bobs → 多次上下点头或多个波波头

coreMeaning.en: a sled used in the sport of bobsledding

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bob(上下晃)+sled(雪橇) → 在雪道上颠簸的雪车
bobsleds = bobsled + s，多辆雪车
bobsleigh 是 bobsled 的英式拼写
bobsleighed = bobsleigh + ed，乘雪橇滑过

coreMeaning.cn: 雪橇车运动；乘雪橇车（进行时）
coreMeaning.en: the sport or act of riding a bobsleigh

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bobsleighing = bobsleigh + ing，雪橇运动
bobsleighs = bobsleigh + s，多辆雪橇车

coreMeaning.en: a short or docked tail; an animal with such a tail

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bob(剪短)+tail(尾巴) → 被剪短的尾巴

coreMeaning.en: having a short or docked tail

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bobtailed = bobtail + ed，有短尾巴的
bobtails = bobtail + s，多只短尾动物
bobv 为词库收录缩写，具体含义视语境而定

coreMeaning.en: a North American quail named for its call

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bobwhite → 其叫声似 bob-white，拟声得名的鸟类

coreMeaning.cn: 薄伽丘（意大利文学家/专有名词）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Boccaccio → 意大利文艺复兴作家，著有《十日谈》

morphemes.meaning: 意式滚球（专有名词来源）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bocce → 意大利传统球类运动，类似英式草坪滚球

coreMeaning.en: derogatory slang for a German person (WWI era)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: boche → 一战时法语俚语，指德国人，现已过时

coreMeaning.cn: 博克啤酒（浓色德国啤酒）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bock → 德语 Einbecker 缩写，浓色德式啤酒
bocks = bock + s，多种博克啤酒
bod → body 的口语缩略，指身体或某人

coreMeaning.cn: 大胆的；令人印象深刻的（美国南方俚语）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bodacious → bold + audacious 混合，表示大胆出众

coreMeaning.en: to be a sign or omen of (something)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bode well/ill → 预示好事/坏事，常与 well/ill 搭配
boded = bode + d，曾经预示

coreMeaning.en: a small grocery store; a wine cellar or winery

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bodega → 来自西班牙语，纽约常见小杂货铺，也指酒窖

coreMeaning.cn: 预示（第三人称单数现在时）
coreMeaning.en: third person singular present of bode

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bodes well → 预示着好结果

coreMeaning.cn: 菩萨（佛教中已证悟但留世度众生者）
coreMeaning.en: a being who has attained enlightenment but remains to help others (Buddhism)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bodhi(觉悟)+sattva(众生) → 觉悟的众生，即菩萨

coreMeaning.cn: 紧身胸衣；女服上身部分
coreMeaning.en: the upper part of a dress; a tight-fitting garment for the upper body

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bodice → bodies 的变体，覆盖上半身的紧身衣
bodices = bodice + es，多件紧身胸衣

coreMeaning.cn: 有……身体的（常用于合成词）
coreMeaning.en: having a body (usually in compounds, e.g., able-bodied)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bodied → 常见于 able-bodied（体格健全的）等合成词
bodies = body → bodies（y变ies），多个身体或团体

coreMeaning.en: of or relating to the body; in person; as a whole

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bodily = body + ly，身体上的，亲自地
bodilyless = bodily + less，无实体/无形体的
boding → ill boding 意为凶兆，foreboding 的近义结构
bodings = boding + s，多个预兆

coreMeaning.en: a blunt needle for threading tape; a hairpin; a pointed instrument

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bodkin → 古英语，指大型缝纫针或穿绳工具，莎士比亚诗中出现
bodkins = bodkin + s，多枚大针

coreMeaning.cn: 博德利图书馆的（牛津大学图书馆）
coreMeaning.en: of or relating to the Bodleian Library at Oxford

morphemes.meaning: 博德利图书馆（专有名词）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Bodleian → 以 Thomas Bodley 爵士命名的牛津大学图书馆

coreMeaning.cn: 博多尼字体（一种印刷字体）
coreMeaning.en: a typeface designed by Giambattista Bodoni

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Bodoni → 以意大利印刷师 G. Bodoni 命名的衬线字体

coreMeaning.en: plural of bod; informal for bodies or people

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bods = bod + s，多个人或多个身体（口语）

coreMeaning.en: the physical structure of a person or animal; a main section; a group

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: body → 身体/主体/团体，多义高频词

coreMeaning.en: a bag used to transport a corpse

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: body-bag = body(遗体)+bag(袋) → 运送遗体的袋子

coreMeaning.en: a person who engages in bodybuilding

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: body-builder = 塑造身体的人 → 健美运动员

coreMeaning.en: the weight or mass of a body

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: body-mass = 身体质量，BMI (Body Mass Index) 中的关键词
body's = body + 's，身体的（所有格）
bodybuilder = 塑造身体的人 → 健美运动员
bodybuilders = bodybuilder + s，多位健美运动员

coreMeaning.en: the activity of strengthening and shaping one's body through exercise

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bodybuilding = body(身体)+building(建造) → 塑造身体的运动

coreMeaning.en: a person or group employed to protect someone from harm

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bodyguard = body(身体)+guard(守卫) → 保护人身安全的保镖
bodyguards = bodyguard + s，多名保镖

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bodyweight = body(身体)+weight(重量) → 体重
